CVEDetector: {"Source": "CVE FEED","Title": "CVE-2026-5111 - Gravity Forms <= 2.10.0 - unauthenticated stored cross-site scripting via hidden product field in repeater","Content": "CVE ID :CVE-2026-5111Published : May 2, 2026, 6:16 a.m. | 1 hour, 23 minutes agoDescription :The Gravity Forms plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in versions up to and including 2.10.0.
